name: dealer.files
query: SELECT id, uuid, slug, model_id, model_type, collection_name, name, file_name, mime_type, disk, conversions_disk, size, original_size, manipulations, custom_properties, order_column, is_optimized, lark_code, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, responsive_images, generated_conversions FROM files WHERE model_type = 'App\\Modules\\Transaction\\Models\\Transaction' AND id > 306776425
